reasoning: The October 27 update strongly implies that an arrest of suspects had already been made by that date. Given that police made arrests within just 8 days of the highly scrutinized October 19 Louvre jewel heist, it is highly likely they acted on concrete intelligence. The chance that these suspects are strongly connected to the physical robbery is high. Even if the initial arrests turn out to be accomplices, holding them in custody significantly increases the chance of catching the primary physical perpetrators by the December 25 deadline. Therefore, the probability of a positive resolution is very high.
